SEARCH
Package clientGui.user

Class SubscriberOptionController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.user.SubscriberOptionController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class SubscriberOptionController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the Subscriber Options menu. Displays available actions for subscribers and guests.

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Initializes the controller. Sets up a listener to disconnect the client when the window is closed.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • initData

      public void initData(ClientUi clientUi, CustomerType CustomerStatus, Integer subId, Customer customer)
      Initializes the controller with customer and session data. Displays specific options if the user is a subscriber.
      Parameters:
      clientUi - The client UI instance
      CustomerStatus - The customer type
      subId - The subscriber ID
      customer - The customer object
